title: Update c/image from the main branch
body:
This
- Updates c/image after https://github.com/containers/image/pull/1904, allowing https://github.com/containers/skopeo/pull/1950 to proceed
- Resolves https://github.com/containers/skopeo/issues/1917 
- Triggers a close of the undesirable #1903, which would be a downgrade.
